name: officekit
description: Plan and coordinate broad, cross-format Office and PDF work through the installed domain Skills.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate Office and PDF artifact work
interface.longDescription: Plan broad, ambiguous, cross-format, and multi-deliverable Office work; load only the required installed domain Skills; and decide whether zero or one available template improves a new artifact.
defaultPrompt: Turn these inputs into the right Office deliverables
Create a report, presentation, and final PDF from these source files
Recommend whether an Office template fits this task
